task_description: Complete UI redesign of the Flutter mobile app to match the Next.js web app features with premium animations, Google Fonts (Inter Tight + Manrope), Google Auth, bottom navigation, shimmer loading, dark mode, and modern card designs across all screens.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not installed in sandbox. All verification done via static file checks: pubspec.yaml has google_fonts/shimmer/animations, theme uses GoogleFonts.interTight+manrope, ShellRoute for bottom nav, Hero animations in product flow, Dismissible in cart/addresses, Google auth service+repository method, Riverpod providers for all features. 12 commits on flutter-mobile-app branch covering all 6 features.
